In the blurred background, other men in similar professional attire are visible, standing in what appears to be an office or briefing room. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing more of the room. The man from the previous shot is now on the left, and another man in a light blue button-down shirt and a lanyard with an ID badge stands in the center. They are all dressed in business casual attire, with many wearing lanyards with ID badges. Their expressions are serious and attentive.
